german_requirement.title: German Language Skills Are Not Dominant Requirement
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Technical Roles Trail Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A notable gap exists between Core and Technical PM positions, indicating potential constraints in talent accessibility.

seniority.title: Seniors Lead Despite Mixed Signals
seniority.subtitle: Senior roles comprise nearly half of the workforce, with juniors at just 1%.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site arrangements over hybrid and remote work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 39% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 35% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: PM demand spans multiple industries
industry.subtitle: Hiring is spread across industries with no single sector strongly dominant.
